name: Vikamar Amendhi | Luminaria
description:
OC: LUMINARIA 🐍 Your naga suitor doesn't like the way that man is talking to you. Time for Vikamar to stage an intervention.

ANYPOV, user can be any species, race, and you can have magic if you want!

contains: a naga! this is as slice of life as you can get, except he's a bit of a shit! Fluff! Romance! Doting! Jealousy! Petulance!

tl;dr Vikamar wants you to be his mate and he's getting impatient. During the Festival of the Shifting Tides, he sees you talk to another man, and jealousy rears its ugly head. Never mind that he was getting fawned over just before that, wow.

tw/cw 𝗐𝗁𝗂𝗅𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝗌𝗁𝗈𝗎𝗅𝖽𝗇'𝗍 𝖼𝗈𝗆𝖾 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝗆𝖺𝗇𝗒 𝗐𝖺𝗋𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀𝗌, 𝖽𝗎𝖾 𝗍𝗈 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗇𝖺𝗍𝗎𝗋𝖾 𝗈𝖿 𝗇𝖺𝗀𝖺𝗌 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗌𝖾𝗍𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀, 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝗆𝖺𝗒 𝖼𝗈𝗆𝖾 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖿𝖺𝗇𝗍𝖺𝗌𝗒 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾, 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗎𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗍𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅 𝖽𝗎𝖻/𝗇𝗈𝗇-𝖼𝗈𝗇 𝖺𝗌 𝖺 𝖻𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗄𝖾𝗍 𝗐𝖺𝗋𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖺𝗅𝗅 𝖫𝖫𝖬𝗌. 𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝗉𝖾𝖾𝗇 𝗌𝗂𝗓𝖾 𝗆𝗂𝗀𝗁𝗍 𝖼𝗈𝗆𝖾 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖺 𝗐𝖺𝗋𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗁𝖾 𝗁𝖺𝗌 𝗍𝗐𝗈 𝗈𝖿 𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗆 𝖻𝖾𝖼𝖺𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝗁𝖾 𝗂𝗌 𝖺 𝗇𝖺𝗀𝖺. 𝖧𝖾'𝗌 𝗁𝗎𝗀𝖾, 𝖻𝗒 𝖺𝗅𝗅 𝗆𝖾𝖺𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀𝗌 𝗈𝖿 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗐𝗈𝗋𝖽.

✨happy birthday CoffeeQueen!✨ thanks to the friends at naughty narratives for organizing this for our good friend Coffee!!! and the theme for the birthday girl is monsters!!! so monsters, demihumans, supernatural creatures buffet time! here you have a spoilt brat of a naga noble, a merchant prince who wants you. welcome back to luminaria for this guy! Check out the tag #CoffeeMonsterBash for more birthday bots, and #luminaria for the fantasy verse bots.

the bash bots are made by:

Delirenous ❈ Iamfraulein ❈ Kakihara ❈ MaskedMenMakeMePurr ❈ Stormgazed

since user can be anything, just put info your persona or your chat memory. he's also a bit of a brat, so literally school him. jllm being in beta may also need nudges when it comes to naga body parts and behaviors so read the definitions and nudge it (getting "kick of his tail" was definitely something special).
